Instance Method# getHIDDescriptorInfo

DriverKitmacOS

```
kern_return_t getHIDDescriptorInfo(uint8_t type, const IOUSBHostHIDDescriptorInfo * * info, uint8_t * index);
```

## [Return Value](/documentation/hiddriverkit/iouserusbhosthiddevice/gethiddescriptorinfo#return-value)

[`kIOReturnSuccess`](/documentation/DriverKit/kIOReturnSuccess) on success, or another value if an error occurs. See [Error Codes](/documentation/DriverKit/error-codes).
